---
title: "_bootstrap.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/_bootstrap.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 4
logic_score: 5.42
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 7.11
overall_score: 5.71
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating bootstrap. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 23 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.utils](file://src.core.utils)
- [logging](file://logging)

### Exports
- `bootstrap`
